data.content: Plan reviewed and approved. All user-level Claude path references identified in location_candidates(), expected_root_hint(), unit tests (managed_skills_tests.rs), integration tests (cli_skills.rs), and README.md. The plan correctly targets all locations, scopes changes to Claude only (leaving Codex/OpenCode unchanged), and includes adequate test coverage. Backward incompatibility for ~/.claude/skills users is intentional per acceptance criteria.
